title: Valve brings native Steam Link app to Apple's Vision Pro
summary: Valve has released a native Steam Link app for Apple Vision Pro, providing a cleaner alternative to third-party streaming solutions. This native integration improves the user experience for gaming on the spatial computing device.
content: New app can replace third-party options that were jankier to use.

zh.title: Valve为Apple Vision Pro带来原生Steam Link应用
zh.summary: Valve为Apple Vision Pro发布了原生Steam Link应用，提供了比第三方流媒体解决方案更清晰的替代方案。这种原生集成改进了在空间计算设备上的游戏用户体验。

title: Nothing’s noise-canceling CMF Buds 2A are down to $19.99 for the rest of today
summary: Nothing's CMF Buds 2A wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation are on sale for $19.99 (down $29) through April 7th on Amazon. The budget earbuds offer 42dB noise cancellation, 8+ hours of battery life, and app support with EQ customization and multi-device pairing.
content:
It’s not every day you find a decent pair of wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation, a transparency mode, and app support for less than $20, which is why the current lighting deal on the CMF Buds 2A stands out. Now through 11:15PM ET today, April 7th, Nothing’s budget earbuds are available on Amazon in all three colors for just $19.99 ($29 off), which matches their lowest price to date.
Nothing CMF Buds 2A

Where to Buy:

 $49 $19.99 at Amazon (black)
 $49 $19.99 at Amazon (white)
 $49 $19.99 at Amazon (orange)

For the price, the Buds 2A cover the basics and then some. They deliver decent (albeit somewhat tinny) sound and 42 decibels of noise cancellation, along with an IP54 rating and a useful transparency mode for staying aware of your surroundings. They also provide a commendable eight hours of battery life per charge with ANC disabled — or up to 35.5 with the included charging case — and feature four onboard mics that leverage Nothing’s noise reduction tech, which helps boost voice call quality. I wouldn’t say voice clarity is their strong suit, though, again, they’re a $20 pair of earbuds.
Like the rest of Nothing’s entry-level earbuds, the 2A also work with the Nothing X app, adding a level of flexibility that’s hard to find at this price. With the app, you can tweak EQ settings, adjust the bass response, switch between ANC modes, or quickly enable multi-device pairing. There’s even a “find my earbuds” feature if you lose them, and you can assign a gesture to trigger your phone’s virtual assistant on the fly, whether that’s Siri or Google Assistant. On top of that, if you’re using a Nothing or CMF phone, you can use your voice to access ChatGPT directly through the earbuds.

zh.title: Nothing的降噪CMF Buds 2A降价至19.99美元（仅限今天）
zh.summary: Nothing的CMF Buds 2A无线耳塞具有主动降噪功能，在Amazon上以19.99美元的价格出售（降价29美元），有效期至4月7日。这款廉价耳塞提供42dB降噪、8小时以上电池续航，以及应用支持、EQ自定义和多设备配对功能。

title: Apple and Lenovo have the least repairable laptops, analysis finds
summary: A new analysis reveals that Apple and Lenovo manufacture the least repairable laptops among major brands, with critical components difficult or impossible to replace. Apple's MacBook Neo is noted as a step toward improving repairability standards.
content: The MacBook Neo is a step in the right direction, though.

zh.title: 分析发现Apple和Lenovo的笔记本电脑可维修性最差
zh.summary: 新的分析显示，在主要品牌中，Apple和Lenovo生产的笔记本电脑可维修性最差，关键部件难以或无法更换。Apple的MacBook Neo被视为提高可维修性标准的一步。

title: Amazon is ending support for older Kindles and Kindle Fires
summary: Starting May 20, 2026, Kindle devices and Kindle Fire tablets from 2012 and earlier will lose access to the Kindle Store for new purchases and downloads. Users retain access to previously downloaded content and can use Kindle services through apps and the web on newer devices.
content:
It’s finally the end of the line for the 1st generation Amazon Kindle. | Image: Amazon	

Amazon has announced that starting on May 20th, 2026, Kindle e-readers and Kindle Fire devices released in 2012 and earlier will "no longer be able to purchase, borrow, or download new content via the Kindle Store," Amazon spokesperson Jackie Burke wrote in an email to The Verge. Users will still be able to read books already downloaded to their devices and can access their accounts and Kindle purchases through the Kindle mobile app, Kindle for Web, and newer devices. If the older devices are deregistered or factory reset, users won't be able to re-register them after the May deadline.
The complete list of affected devices goes all the way  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 亚马逊将停止对较旧Kindle和Kindle Fire的支持
zh.summary: 从2026年5月20日开始，2012年及更早的Kindle设备和Kindle Fire平板电脑将无法访问Kindle商店进行新购买和下载。用户仍然可以访问之前下载的内容，并可以在较新的设备上通过应用程序和网络使用Kindle服务。

title: I can’t help rooting for tiny open source AI model maker Arcee
summary: Arcee, a 26-person U.S. startup, has built a high-performing open-source large language model that is gaining adoption among developers. The company demonstrates that smaller teams can compete effectively in the AI model market.
content: Arcee is a tiny 26-person U.S. startup that built a high-performing, massive, open source LLM. And it's gaining popularity with OpenClaw users.

title: Spotify’s Prompted Playlists can help you find new podcasts to listen to
summary: Spotify has expanded its Prompted Playlists feature to include podcasts, letting Premium users generate customized podcast recommendations using text prompts. The beta feature, available in English for U.S. and Canadian users, helps listeners discover shows aligned with their interests.
content:
On Tuesday, Spotify expanded its Prompted Playlists feature to include podcasts, an update that could make it easier for Premium users to find new shows to listen to. Prompted Playlists were originally launched as a beta feature in December, but previously only worked for music. You can use the feature to effectively generate customized Discover Weekly playlists using text prompts to "steer the algorithm" toward specific genres or themes.  
Tuesday's update allows you to do the same thing with playlists of podcast episodes. The feature is still in beta, though, and is currently only available in English for Premium users in the U.S., Canada …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Spotify的提示播放列表可帮助您发现新播客

title: You can now turn 2D apps into 3D while using the Galaxy XR headset
summary: Google's 'auto-spatialization' feature is launching on Samsung Galaxy XR headsets, automatically converting 2D apps, websites, and videos into 3D spatial experiences. The experimental feature supports content up to 1080p at 30fps and operates on focused app windows.
content:
Android XR is getting a new feature that turns 2D apps, websites, images, and videos into "3D experiences." The feature, which Google calls "auto-spatialization," was initially announced last year, and it's launching on Tuesday as an experimental feature for Samsung Galaxy XR headsets.
Here's a video from Google that gives you an idea about how auto-spatialization might look in practice:

There are a few caveats to auto-spatialization: it supports content up to 1080p or lower at 30fps, it "uses slightly more battery power," and it only works "on the app window currently in focus," Google says. But if you have a Galaxy XR device, it could be …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 现在您可以在使用Galaxy XR头显时将2D应用转换为3D
zh.summary: 谷歌的"自动空间化"功能正在三星Galaxy XR头显上推出，可自动将2D应用、网站和视频转换为3D空间体验。这个实验性功能支持高达1080p的30fps内容，并在聚焦的应用窗口上运行。

title: I wish this selfie phone case was better for selfies
summary: The Selfix case for iPhone 17 Pro features a rear-facing circular screen to enable framing selfies with the phone's superior rear cameras, but the implementation underperforms in practice. The clever concept fails to meaningfully improve upon the iPhone's advanced front-facing camera.
content:
Making the case for better selfies.	

The Selfix phone case is a classic example of a great idea in theory that falls apart in practice.
It's a case for the iPhone 17 Pro with a circular screen on the back. It mirrors the middle of your main phone screen, making it easier to frame up selfies using your phone's higher-quality rear cameras rather than the selfie camera. A nice concept! I wish it worked better.
Selfie cameras have come a long way, and the updated sensor in the iPhone 17 series' front-facing camera is more than capable in good lighting. But there are still ways that the bigger sensors and lenses in your phone's rear cameras outperform them: They can do slow-motion …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我希望这款自拍手机壳在自拍方面能更好
zh.summary: Selfix iPhone 17 Pro手机壳采用后置圆形屏幕设计，可以使用手机出色的后置摄像头进行自拍构图，但实际实现表现不佳。这个巧妙的概念未能有意义地改进iPhone先进的前置摄像头。

title: Samsung’s Galaxy S26 Ultra is $200 off for the first time
summary: Samsung's Galaxy S26 Ultra flagship phone with Privacy Display feature is now $200 off at major retailers, bringing the 256GB model to $1,099.99. The device features a high-refresh OLED screen and dual telephoto lenses, though it lacks magnetic charging like Google's Pixel phones.
content:
Privacy Display ensures that onlookers can’t see what’s on the screen. | Photo: Allison Johnson / The Verge	

My colleague Allison Johnson loved the Privacy Display in her review of the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra. The display feature, which blocks onlookers from getting a peep at what’s on the screen when viewed from the side, is worth getting the S26 Ultra for if you are serious about privacy during your commute or elsewhere. And thankfully, it’s not as expensive to buy the only device in Samsung’s latest smartphone lineup that has the unique mode. The cost of an unlocked S26 Ultra with 256GB of storage has dropped to $1,099.99 at Amazon, Samsung, and Best Buy, which is $200 off its original price — and now just $100 more than the S26 Plus that has fewer features.
Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra

Where to Buy:

 $1299.99 $1099.99 at Samsung (256GB)
 $1299.99 $1099.99 at Amazon (256GB)
 $1299.99 $1099.99 at Best Buy (256GB)

In addition to Privacy Display, the S26 Ultra is Samsung’s biggest, most capable phone yet. It has a 6.9-inch 3120 x 1440 OLED screen that can go up to a 120Hz refresh rate, and its dual telephoto lenses offer various optical zoom levels to help you find the right crop without digital noise being added. Also of note, this is Samsung’s only S26 phone that supports (and includes) an S Pen stylus.
It’s a flagship Android 16 phone that isn’t missing many features, unless magnet-based recharging matters to you. Unlike Google’s latest Pixel 10 phones, Samsung is still skipping on magnets even though they’ve become a popular way to recharge. Despite lacking magnets, the S26 Ultra is no slouch when it comes to boasting the latest wireless charging standard, with Qi2 speeds peaking at 25W with the right charger, which is faster than other phones in the series. You can always get a magnet-equipped case for the phone, and you won’t miss out on much.
If you aren’t swayed by the Privacy Display, the other S26 models got cheaper, too. The smaller S26 debuted at $899.9

zh.title: 三星Galaxy S26 Ultra首次降价200美元
zh.summary: 搭载隐私显示屏功能的三星Galaxy S26 Ultra旗舰手机现在在各大零售商处降价200美元，256GB版本降至1,099.99美元。该设备配备高刷新率OLED屏幕和双远摄镜头，但缺乏谷歌Pixel手机的磁性充电功能。

title: A new Anthropic model found security problems ‘in every major operating system and web browser’
summary: Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview model, developed under Project Glasswing with partners including Nvidia, Google, Amazon, Apple, and Microsoft, has identified security vulnerabilities in every major operating system and web browser. The model is available to launch partners for defensive security work and will not be publicly released.
content:
Anthropic is debuting a new AI model as part of a cybersecurity partnership with Nvidia, Google, Amazon Web Services, Apple, Microsoft, and other companies. Project Glasswing, as it's called, is billed as a way for large companies, and potentially even the government, to flag vulnerabilities in their systems with virtually no human intervention.
Anthropic is offering its launch partners access to Claude Mythos Preview, a new general-purpose model that it's not currently planning to publicly release due to security concerns. Newton Cheng, the cyber lead for Anthropic's frontier red team, told The Verge that the model will ideally give cyber  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Apple’s foldable iPhone is on track to launch in September, report says

title: The rugged Bose Soundlink Flex is 25 percent off right now
summary: The rugged Bose Soundlink Flex (second-gen) portable Bluetooth speaker is discounted to $119 at major retailers, matching near its lowest price. The updated model features improved controls and high-resolution audio codec support while maintaining 12 hours of battery life and IP67 weatherproofing.
content:
We saw a host of excellent Bose discounts during Amazon’s so-called Big Spring Sale last month; however, none of them were quite as steep as the current price drop we’re seeing on the latest Bose Soundlink Flex. Right now, the portable speaker is on sale at Amazon, Walmart, and Best Buy for $119 ($40 off), nearly matching its best price to date.
Bose Soundlink Flex (second-gen)

Where to Buy:

 $159 $119 at Amazon
 $159 $119 at Walmart
 $159 $119 at Best Buy

A few years back, we crowned the original Soundlink Flex the best portable Bluetooth speaker under $200. It was an impressive speaker with expansive sound and a surprising amount of low-end thump, not to mention a rugged, IP67-rated design that allowed you to take it pretty much anywhere. It was a real winner in many respects, particularly for its compact size, which is probably why Bose didn’t feel the need to completely reinvent the wheel with the second iteration. 
The second-gen Flex is nearly identical to the first-gen model, only with a few subtle refinements. The travel-friendly speaker features a redesigned control strip with a new play / pause button and a power button that’s easier to locate — a welcome upgrade, given that the buttons on the original weren’t easy to use by feel alone. The 2nd Gen version also features adjustable EQ and support for higher-res AAC and aptX codecs, though you still get up to 12 hours of battery life, stereo pairing (if you own two), and weatherproofing, making the silicone-wrapped speaker a great picnic or poolside companion.
More deals and discounts
Lego’s adorable R2-D2 replica is currently on sale at Amazon, Walmart, and Target for $79.99 ($20 off), matching its lowest price to date. The 1,050-piece set is a nice, decor-worthy homage to everyone’s favorite R2-series astromech droid, complete with a 180-degree swiveling head, an attachable periscope, and a miniature Artoo that’s meant to sit alongside the included info plaque.
If Google’s premium subscriptions don’t sc

zh.summary: 坚固的Bose Soundlink Flex（第二代）便携式蓝牙扬声器在主要零售商处的价格降至$119，接近最低价。更新的型号具有改进的控制和高分辨率音频编解码器支持，同时保持12小时的电池续航和IP67防水等级。

title: Chrome is finally getting vertical tabs
summary: Google Chrome's latest update introduces vertical tabs displayed in a sidebar and a Reading Mode feature to help users manage tabs more efficiently and view cleaner web pages.
content: Google Chrome's latest update brings vertical tabs and a cleaner Reading Mode to help manage cluttered browsing.

zh.title: Chrome终于支持垂直标签页
zh.summary: 谷歌Chrome最新更新在侧边栏中引入了垂直标签页和阅读模式功能，帮助用户更高效地管理标签页并实现更清爽的网页浏览。

title: Vertical browser tabs are better and you should use them
summary: Google Chrome now supports vertical tabs displayed in a sidebar instead of across the top, addressing a long-overdue feature request alongside a new Reading Mode for cleaner page viewing.
content:
Just look at all that vertical space. | Image: Google	

Google's Chrome browser is getting a couple of new features, both of them extremely welcome and wildly overdue. The first is a reading mode, which does what it already does in most other browsers: strip out a lot of website cruft to make pages easier to read. Reading mode is good, you should use it, a lot of websites are bad. The second feature is the big one: vertical tabs. Instead of having all your tabs in a row across the top of your browser, you can now right-click on the tab bar and select "Show Tabs Vertically" to have them appear in a sidebar instead.
Vertical tabs are hardly a new idea about browsers - even the original Chrome team …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 垂直浏览器标签页更好，你应该使用它们
zh.summary: 谷歌Chrome现已支持在侧边栏中显示的垂直标签页，而非传统的顶部方式，满足了长期的功能需求，并新增了阅读模式以实现更清爽的页面浏览。

title: Testing suggests Google's AI Overviews tells millions of lies per hour
summary: Testing reveals Google's AI Overviews search feature produces millions of inaccurate results per hour, raising questions about whether 90 percent accuracy is acceptable for AI-generated search summaries.
content: Is 90 percent accuracy good enough for a search robot?

content: Uber is expanding its AWS contract to run more of its ride-sharing features on Amazon's chips. This is a thumb-of-the nose at Oracle and Google.

zh.title: 优步成为最新采用亚马逊AI芯片的公司
zh.summary: 优步正在扩展其AWS合同，以在其打车业务中更多地利用亚马逊定制AI芯片，这标志着AWS半导体的又一次重大采用。

title: Linux kernel maintainers are following through on removing Intel 486 support
summary: Linux kernel maintainers are removing Intel 486 processor support from the kernel, determining that maintaining compatibility with decades-old architecture is not worth the development effort.
content: Linux devs think even one second spent on 486 support is a second too many.

zh.title: Linux 内核维护者正在删除对英特尔 486 的支持
zh.summary: Linux 内核维护者正在从内核中删除英特尔 486 处理器支持，认为维护与数十年前的架构的兼容性不值得花费开发力气。

title: Suno and major music labels reportedly clash over AI music sharing
summary: AI music platform Suno is in licensing disputes with Universal Music Group and Sony Music Entertainment over whether AI-generated songs can be freely shared online. The disagreement centers on distribution rights, with labels wanting content restricted within the app while Suno advocates for broader sharing capabilities.
content:
The AI-powered musicmaker Suno is struggling to reach licensing deals with Universal Music Group and Sony Music Entertainment. That's according to a report from the Financial Times, which says both sides can't agree on whether users should be able to share the AI-generated songs they create.
"Universal wants AI-generated tracks to stay inside apps such as Suno and not spread freely across the internet. Suno, however, wants users to be able to share and distribute those songs more widely," the Financial Times reports. Suno, which lets users create AI-generated music with a text prompt, became the subject of a massive copyright lawsuit from U …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Suno 与主要唱片公司因人工智能音乐分享发生冲突
zh.summary: 人工智能音乐平台 Suno 与环球音乐集团和索尼音乐娱乐公司就人工智能生成的歌曲是否可以在网上自由分享的问题存在许可纠纷。分歧集中在发行权上，唱片公司希望内容限制在应用程序内，而 Suno 主张提供更广泛的分享功能。

title: Anthropic ups compute deal with Google and Broadcom amid skyrocketing demand
summary: Anthropic has expanded its compute partnership with Google and Broadcom to meet surging demand as the company's run-rate revenue has reached $30 billion.
content: Anthropic bulked up its compute deal with Google and Broadcom as the company has seen its run-rate revenue surge to $30 billion.

zh.title: Anthropic 在需求激增之际扩大与谷歌和博通的计算交易
zh.summary: Anthropic 已扩大与谷歌和博通的计算合作伙伴关系，以满足激增的需求，该公司的年化收入已达到 300 亿美元。

title: Finally, Artemis delivers some exceptional, high-quality photos of the Moon
summary: The Artemis mission has captured exceptional high-resolution photographs of the Moon, Earth, and Sun, advancing lunar exploration capabilities. These images represent significant scientific achievements for NASA's lunar program.
content: The Moon, the Earth, and the Sun—oh what fun!

zh.title: 阿尔特弥斯任务终于交付月球的出色高清照片
zh.summary: 阿尔特弥斯任务已拍摄月球、地球和太阳的高分辨率照片,推进了月球探测能力。这些图像代表了美国航空航天局月球项目的重大科学成就。

title: Spotify’s prompted playlist feature will now work for podcasts, too
summary: Spotify is expanding its AI-powered prompt-based playlist feature to work with podcasts, allowing users to create playlists using natural language commands. This extension broadens the platform's AI capabilities beyond music to its growing podcasting library.
content: Spotify will now allow users to input natural language prompts to create podcast playlist.

zh.title: Spotify的提示创建播放列表功能现在也支持播客
zh.summary: Spotify正在扩展其AI驱动的提示式播放列表功能，以支持播客，允许用户使用自然语言命令创建播放列表。这一扩展将该平台的AI功能从音乐扩展到其不断增长的播客库。

title: A wide foldable iPhone dummy emerges amid rumors of a delay
summary: Leaked dummy units of Apple's rumored foldable iPhone reveal a notably wide form factor distinguishing it from current iPhone designs. The leak coincides with reports that early production tests have encountered issues that could delay the device's launch by several months.
content:
The two iPhone 18 Pro dummies look much like last year’s 17 Pro models. | Image: Sonny Dickson	

We might have our first good look at the shape of the oddly wide iPhone Fold, after leaker and journalist Sonny Dickson shared photos of what he says is a dummy unit of the foldable, alongside similar models of the iPhone 18 Pro and 18 Pro Max. The apparent design leak comes as it's reported that early engineering tests of the foldable have suffered from production problems which may cause it to ship months later than other iPhones this year.
Dickson, who has a good track record for sourcing accurate dummy models of Apple and Samsung phones used by case makers to test and design their products, shared images of the foldable unit on Bluesky  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 宽屏可折叠iPhone模型曝光，传言可能延期发布
zh.summary: 泄露的苹果传言中可折叠iPhone的模型单位显示了明显的宽屏形状，区别于当前iPhone设计。这一泄露与早期生产测试遇到问题可能导致设备发布延迟几个月的报道同时出现。

title: Gemini is making it faster for distressed users to reach mental health resources
summary: Google has updated its Gemini chatbot to improve how it directs users in crisis to mental health resources through a streamlined one-touch feature. The update addresses safety concerns following a wrongful death lawsuit alleging the AI coached a user toward suicide.
content:
Google says it has updated Gemini to better direct users to get mental health resources during moments of crisis. The change comes as the tech giant faces a wrongful death lawsuit alleging its chatbot "coached" a man to die by suicide, the latest in a string of lawsuits alleging tangible harm from AI products.
When a conversation indicates a user is in a potential crisis related to suicide or self-harm, Gemini already launches a "Help is available" module that directs users to mental health crisis resources, like a suicide hotline or crisis text line. Google says the update - really more of a redesign - will streamline this into a "one-touc …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Gemini让处于困境的用户更快速地获取心理健康资源
zh.summary: 谷歌已更新其Gemini聊天机器人，以改进它如何通过简化的一键功能将陷入危机的用户引导至心理健康资源。此更新旨在解决安全问题，此前有一起过失致人死亡诉讼声称AI引导一用户走向自杀。

title: Intel is going all-in on advanced chip packaging
summary: Intel is investing heavily in advanced chip packaging technologies to capitalize on growing AI demand and compete in the booming AI chip market. The packaging innovations represent a strategic shift to address Intel's competitive position.
content: Intel is hoping to cash in on the AI boom.

zh.title: 英特尔全力投入先进芯片封装
zh.summary: 英特尔正在大力投资先进芯片封装技术，以利用日益增长的人工智能需求并在蓬勃发展的人工智能芯片市场中竞争。这些封装创新代表了一个战略转变，以应对英特尔的竞争地位。

title: AI startup Rocket offers vibe McKinsey-style reports at a fraction of the cost
summary: Rocket has launched an AI platform that provides McKinsey-style strategy and competitive intelligence reports at significantly lower costs, moving beyond traditional code generation tools. The platform combines strategy consultation, product building insights, and competitive analysis in a single offering.
content: Rocket's new AI platform combines strategy, product building, and competitive intelligence, aiming to move beyond code generation.

zh.title: AI创业公司Rocket以远低于麦肯锡的价格提供麦肯锡风格的报告
zh.summary: Rocket推出了一个AI平台，以显著更低的成本提供麦肯锡风格的战略和竞争情报报告，超越了传统的代码生成工具。该平台将战略咨询、产品构建见解和竞争分析结合在一个统一的产品中。

title: AI design platform Picsart launches a creator monetization program
summary: Picsart introduced a creator monetization program enabling content creators to generate original assets using Picsart's AI tools for campaigns and earn revenue based on audience engagement. The initiative aims to help creators capitalize on the growing demand for AI-generated content.
content: The program invites creators to create original content with Picsart tools for a specific campaign, share it on their social channels, and earn revenue based on how their audience engages.

zh.title: AI设计平台Picsart推出创意者变现计划
zh.summary: Picsart推出了一个创意者变现计划，使内容创作者能够使用Picsart的AI工具为活动生成原创资产，并根据受众参与度赚取收益。该举措旨在帮助创作者利用AI生成内容日益增长的需求。

title: Astronauts set distance record, revealing the Moon as a place to be explored
summary: Astronauts have set a new distance record while exploring the Moon, with their observations revealing lunar discoveries that challenge human perception and understanding. The achievement highlights the Moon as an active frontier for human space exploration.
content: "Humans have probably not evolved to see what we’re seeing. It is truly hard to describe. It is amazing."

zh.title: 宇航员创造距离记录，揭示月球作为探索之地
zh.summary: 宇航员在探索月球时创造了新的距离记录，他们的观察揭示了月球发现，挑战了人类的认知和理解。这一成就凸显了月球是人类太空探索的活跃前沿。
